summary_en: 1,250,000 shares (2.99% of outstanding), ¥1,000M limit, May 22, 2026–Mar 31, 2027. Execution window per stock market conditions. Rationale: improve capital efficiency and expand shareholder returns under mid-term plan targeting 40% payout ratio.
title_en: Notice of Determination of Terms of Own Share Acquisition
translation_en_brief: Asahi Broadcasting Group Holdings resolved on May 21, 2026 to acquire up to 1,250,000 of its own ordinary shares (2.99% of issued shares excluding treasury stock) for a maximum aggregate of ¥1,000 million, with acquisition period from May 22, 2026 to March 31, 2027. The board cited the company's mid-term management plan (2026–2028), which prioritizes growth investments in content and anime while improving capital efficiency and strengthening shareholder returns. The company is targeting an increase in dividend payout ratio from the historical 30% to 40%. The buyback is intended to improve return on capital and expand shareholder returns, supporting long-term value creation amid changing business conditions. No specific price ceiling or execution method (e.g., ToSTNeT-3) is disclosed in this resolution; those details are to be determined during the purchase window.
